Think modern defenses are rock solid?

You haven't seen Capello's AC Milan! In '93/94, they won Serie A and the Champions League conceding a ridiculous 15 goals in 34 league games. Then they absolutely dismantled Cruyff's 'Dream Team' 4-0 in the #UCL final. That's defensive masterclass, not parking the bus! Absolute titans. #ACMilan #SerieA #UCLHistory

"Did we lose something when the classic 4-4-2 died?"

Two pure strikers, upfront, hungry. Think Yorke & Cole. Shearer & Sutton. Vieri & Ronaldo. Defences ABSOLUTELY SHIVERED.

Modern tactics killed it. More control, less raw chaos. Those days were pure box office. #FootballHistory
